strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in high-traffic environments (Optilyz)

response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack development skills with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB (Optilyz), and has recent experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq). However, there is no direct evidence of working with Nest.js or Vitest, which are core to the role. Relational database experience (PostgreSQL/MySQL) is not mentioned in recent roles, and AI agent work lacks implementation details.
